backlog_cursor.description: Run 12 on 2026-02-22. Commented on #930 (infinite watch loop) and #944 (missing type). Checked PRs #975, #976, #977 CI (all pending). PR #978 opened by Copilot for #918.

970.description: Provided API migration guidance for Literate.FormatLiterateNodes to WriteHtml/ToHtml

961.description: Explained that docfx [!code-fsharp[...]] syntax is not supported by fsdocs; suggested pre-processing or feature request

931.description: Linked to draft PR #975 for Ctrl+C fix

918.description: Identified IsLibrary filter in ProjectCracker.fs and outlined fix steps

930.description: Identified root causes for infinite watch loop (duplicate watchers, missing output exclusion); debugging steps suggested

944.description: Suggested URL collision between same-named namespace and type as likely cause; pointed to readCommentsInto and ResolveUrlBaseNameForEntity

931.description: Changed waitForKey to use Console.CancelKeyPress + ManualResetEventSlim instead of Console.ReadKey(). Build succeeded.
931.pr_title: [Repo Assist] Use Ctrl+C to stop watch mode instead of any key press

21.0.1.description: RELEASE_NOTES.md updated to promote [Unreleased] FCS 43.10.100 to 21.0.1. Draft PR created.

2026-02-22.description: Updated G-Research.FSharp.Analyzers 0.18.0 -> 0.21.0, Ionide.Analyzers 0.14.7 -> 0.14.11. Build succeeded. Draft PR created.

925.author: tymokvo
925.reason: CHANGES_REQUESTED from nojaf since Jul 2024, stale

notes: Repo has 80+ open issues. Latest is #974 (announcement from dsyme about Repo Assist).

Open PRs: #978 (Copilot: support executable projects, fixes #918), #977 (deps update, draft), #976 (Release 21.0.1, draft), #975 (Ctrl+C watch fix, draft), #965 (emoji fix, ready), #925 (watch mode fix - CHANGES_REQUESTED), #875 (fsdocs init draft, stale Jan 2024), #776 (node_modules ignore).
Latest tag: 8.0.1 (GitHub tags behind; actual NuGet latest is 21.0.0 from 2025-11-12)
Release process: update RELEASE_NOTES.md, push to main, CI publishes to NuGet with --skip-duplicate
System.Drawing.Common 4.7.0 critical vulnerability (GHSA-rxg9-xrhp-64gj) is a transitive dep - needs investigation to find source package
Larger dep updates deferred: Suave 2->3, Ionide.ProjInfo 0.62->0.74, System.Text.Json 8->10, NUnit 3->4, FsUnit 5->7, NUnit3TestAdapter 4->6
PR #975 CI: pending. PR #976 CI: pending. PR #977 CI: pending.

Issue #930: infinite watch loop root cause - duplicate FileSystemWatcher on same input directory (docsWatchers + templateWatchers both watch this.input), and no output-dir exclusion in Changed handler. Fix: deduplicate watcher paths; exclude output dir in Changed handler.
Issue #944: missing type (AvalonLog type in AvalonLog namespace) - likely URL collision between namespace page and type page. May need investigation in ResolveUrlBaseNameForEntity.

PR #978 (Copilot): simply removes IsLibrary guard entirely. Repo Assist had suggested a --includeExecutableProjects flag, but Copilot went with always-allow-exe approach. Worth reviewing for backwards compat.
Tasks to prioritize next run: task3 (codebase study/improvement), task10 (repo forward), check CI on Repo Assist PRs
